tasks.instruction: Register for the earliest in-person community dinner happening this calendar month that starts in the evening (after 5 pm), costs no more than $20, and takes place in a wheelchair-accessible venue.

tasks.instruction: Find an accessible restaurant in Springfield’s Riverside neighborhood that can host a group of 8–10 guests, has an average main dish price of $18 or less, includes a step-free entrance and accessible restroom, and is within 500 meters of accessible public transit, then send a group visit inquiry from its page.
